title: Just Steel
description: This mod adds a new metal - steel. Its slightly better than iron
body:
Mod That adds Steel and items and armor from it.

Durability :

Items : 350 ( +100 iron )

Sword Damage 6.5 ( +0.5 to iron )

Armor Protection ( Full ) 3, 7, 5, 2 ( +3 to iron )

 

Machine Recipe is on the images

 

To get Steel :

In ironworks furnace iron ingot + purvelized coal

Purvelized coal is 1 coal into 2 purvelized coal in coal grinder
